scenarios.description: valueOf known tag 'input' with wrong namespace returns a new Tag instance that is not submittable
scenarios.expectedResult: returns a new Tag (not == static), tag.isFormSubmittable() == false, tag.isInline() == false
pseudocode: TEST TC07 valueOf known tag wrong-namespace

scenarios.description: valueOf with different case and preserveTagCase false returns static tag with normalized name
scenarios.precondition: ParseSettings where preserveTagCase() == false, namespace = Parser.NamespaceHtml
scenarios.expectedResult: returns static Tag instance for 'div', tag.getName().equals("div"), isFormSubmittable() == false

scenarios.description: valueOf(String, ParseSettings) overload returns static tag for known 'textarea' and preserves formSubmit
scenarios.precondition: Use overload valueOf(tagName, settings), default namespace = Parser.NamespaceHtml
scenarios.expectedResult: returns static Tag instance for 'textarea', tag.isFormSubmittable() == false, tag.preserveWhitespace() == true
pseudocode: TEST TC09 valueOf overload preserves properties
